positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a bioluminescent woodland creature, resembling a glowing forest fox mixed with a luna moth, sitting among stylized, oversized ferns and glowing mushrooms. The creature has delicate, ethereal wings and a bushy tail tipped with glowing blue light. Composition should be highly centralized and symmetrical, with the fox filling the frame while maintaining clear negative space around the edges. Use a vibrant nocturnal palette of deep indigos, emerald greens, electric teals, and soft bioluminescent glows. Style should be highly detailed, graphic, and aesthetically clean, reminiscent of modern magical realism combined with elegant tattoo flash art. Studio lighting, vector quality, print-ready, perfect silhouette, high contrast, flat graphic shading, no gradients or overly complex textures.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, grayscale, gradient, photographic, realistic, logo, trademark
